title: LAV 3X Keops 345ml/11.75oz Clear Whisky Glasses Water Juice Cocktail Tumblers
features: Perfect Capacity: 345ml (11.75oz), suitable for a variety of beverages.
Ergonomic Dimensions: 10cm height and 8.5cm diameter for easy handling and stability.
Versatile Use: Ideal for water, whiskey, cocktails, juices, and more
Elegant Design: Sophisticated crystal-cut pattern for a luxurious look.
description: The LAV Keops Glass Tumbler is a stylish and versatile addition to your drinkware collection. With a 345ml (11.75oz) capacity, this glass is perfect for serving a variety of beverages, including water, juices, whiskey, or cocktails. Featuring a sophisticated crystal-cut design, the Keops Tumbler beautifully reflects light, enhancing its aesthetic appeal and elevating your drinking experience. Crafted from premium-quality glass, the Keops Tumbler combines durability with elegance, making it suitable for everyday use or special occasions. Its dimensions—10cm in height and 8.5cm in diameter—offer a comfortable grip and a stable base, ensuring practicality without compromising style.
